name: ScaleValue.ScaleStringFormat
summary: Specifies preferred formats for automatically created string descriptions of a scale value.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: No preference for automatically created string descriptions of a scale value.

enum_values.name: RatioFormat
enum_values.summary: Prefer the ratio format using a colon, like "1:4" or "4:1".

enum_values.name: EquationFormat
enum_values.summary: Prefer the equation format using an equal sign, like "1 = 4" or "4 = 1".

enum_values.name: FractionFormat
enum_values.summary: Prefer the fraction format using a slash, like "1/4" or "4/1".

enum_values.name: Unset
enum_values.summary: ON_ScaleValue::ScaleStringFormat::Unset is used to indicate no preference is set. This condition is different from ON_ScaleValue::ScaleStringFormat::None.
